# Image Content Registry

**Purpose:** Every image slot the built pages either render as a visible placeholder or have the _capability_ to use but currently don't, because no real school photography exists yet. Generated by (a) checking every built page for image component usage (`ResponsiveImage`, `ImageText`, `PageHero`'s `backgroundImage`) — none are used by any of the six built pages today — and (b) checking what each page's own content explicitly names as a pending photo. See [README.md](./README.md).

**Not every item here is equally urgent.** Three different states appear in this table, and conflating them would overstate the problem:

- **Active placeholder** — currently visible on a live route, reads as "[Photo pending]" to any visitor today. Highest urgency.
- **Latent / not yet wired** — the config value exists (`null`) but no component actually renders it yet, so there is no visible defect today — only a gap that will need filling once the consuming feature is built.
- **Silently absent** — nothing on the page shows anything is missing (an optional prop simply isn't passed), but supplying the real asset would be a genuine improvement.

---

| ID      | Purpose                                           | Page                              | Priority | Owner        | Status   | Replacement Notes                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| ------- | ------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------- | -------- | ------------ | -------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| IMG-001 | Site favicon                                      | Sitewide                          | P1       | School Admin | Required | **Active, but wrong, not missing** — `src/app/favicon.ico` is still the default Next.js scaffold icon (unmodified since Phase 0B.1). Every page shows it in the browser tab today.                                                                                                  |
| IMG-002 | Site logo                                         | Sitewide (Header/Footer)          | P2       | School Admin | Required | **Latent** — `src/config/branding.ts` → `BRANDING.logo.src` is `null`. Header/Footer currently render `{SCHOOL.name}` as text only; no `<img>` slot exists yet to wire a logo into. Not a visible defect today, but the natural next step once a logo file exists.                  |
| IMG-003 | Open Graph / social share image                   | Sitewide (all 4 pages + homepage) | P1       | School Admin | Required | **Latent** — no page's `metadata.ts` sets an `openGraph.images` field. Affects how every page's link preview looks when shared on WhatsApp/social — directly relevant given this school's WhatsApp-heavy communication today.                                                       |
| IMG-004 | Principal's portrait                              | About (Principal's Message)       | P2       | School Admin | Required | **Silently absent** — `QuoteBlock` supports an optional `avatar` prop; `About/page.tsx` doesn't pass one. The section renders correctly without it (text-only testimonial), so this is an enhancement, not a fix.                                                                   |

| IMG-010 | School Life Gallery — Sports & Competitions photo | School Life (Gallery Preview)     | P0       | School Admin | Required | **Active placeholder** — same section, sports & competitions category.                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| IMG-011 | School Life Gallery — Cultural Activities photo   | School Life (Gallery Preview)     | P0       | School Admin | Required | **Active placeholder** — same section, cultural activities category.                                                                                                                                                                                                                |

| IMG-013 | Contact — Location map / campus exterior photo    | Contact (Map Placeholder)         | P1       | School Admin | Required | **Active placeholder** — visible today as a `Callout` disclaimer at `/contact` (no photo grid, since the brief explicitly forbids an embedded map). A Google Maps screenshot, embeddable link, or labeled exterior photo — whichever School Admin confirms — paired with `TXT-059`. |

---

## Totals

**13 image items** — 9 Active placeholders (Campus Gallery ×4, School Life Gallery ×4, Contact Map ×1), 1 Active-but-wrong (favicon, P1), 1 Latent OG image (P1), 2 Latent/Silently-absent enhancements (logo, Principal portrait, both P2).

**Not registered, deliberately:** `public/dev/placeholder.png` — a solid-color PNG used only by the dev-only `/dev/playground` route, which 404s in production ([DECISIONS.md § D-015](../DECISIONS.md#d-015--permanent-devplayground-route-replaces-temporary-preview-and-delete-pattern)). It never reaches a real visitor and needs no replacement.
